name: wordcloud2.js

en.when_to_use: Use it when keyword weights must form a word cloud with Chinese text support, rotation, and non-rectangular outlines instead of hand-written canvas, which fails at text measurement, collision search, weight scaling, and dense layout.
en.why_valuable: AI can normally only absolutely position words at random. It cannot handle pixel-level collision detection, font-width measurement, weight-to-font-size mapping, rotated occupancy, or a reproducible compact layout. wordcloud2.js closes those steps around a [word,weight] list.

data_in.note: list uses the exact upstream tuple shape: [word,weight,...optional extra values]. weight must be finite. boot assigns this list to WordCloud options.list; frequency-map objects are not accepted.

list: [string, finite number, ...unknown[]] -- first item is the word and second is its weight

options?.fontFamily?: CSS font-family string -- defaults include Trebuchet MS, Heiti TC, 微软雅黑, and generic sans-serif
options?.weightFactor?: positive number -- defaults to 1 and multiplies weights into px font sizes
options?.minSize?: non-negative number -- defaults to 0, meaning no limit

spec.note: The canvas CSS size and width/height backing store must be explicit pixel values before drawing. boot defaults to a height of 400px and measures container width. Clear and redraw after dimensions change; iron rule 3 forbids vh and percentage heights.

when_to_use: 需要把关键词权重排成支持中文、旋转与非矩形轮廓的词云时用它而非手写 canvas,因为原生在文字测量、碰撞搜索、权重缩放和密集布局上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能随机绝对定位文字,做不到像素级碰撞检测、字体宽度测量、权重到字号映射、旋转后占位和可复现的紧凑布局;wordcloud2.js 用 [word,weight] 列表闭环这些步骤。

data_in.note: list 是上游精确 tuple 形状:[词,权重,...可选附加值];weight 必须为有限数。boot 把该列表写入 WordCloud options.list,不接受词频对象。

list: [string, finite number, ...unknown[]] —— 第一项词,第二项权重

options?.fontFamily?: CSS font-family string —— 默认含 Trebuchet MS、Heiti TC、微软雅黑与通用 sans-serif
options?.weightFactor?: positive number —— 默认 1,把权重乘成 px 字号
options?.minSize?: non-negative number —— 默认 0,表示不限制

spec.note: canvas 的 CSS 尺寸与 width/height backing store 必须在绘制前写成明确像素值;boot 默认高 400px并量取容器宽。尺寸变化需清空并重绘,铁律 3 禁 vh/百分比高。

example._why: tuple 列表、权重到字号和弧度旋转容易被写成错误对象结构,minimal example 给出真实 WordCloud options。

uplink: display/local-interact 类,默认无需上行。若需词项 hover 或点击,由消费 AI 通过上游 options 回调自行处理并按载体分支;本条不焊接统一事件出口。

carriers.artifact: inferred-not-tested:主线程 canvas,无 worker/font CDN 或外部 CSS
carriers.widget: supported:显式 canvas 落 shadowRoot,默认字体使用系统 font stack,无 document.head 注入

isolation.evidence: Pure canvas — no head/style injection. `document.body.appendChild(fcanvas)` exists (src/wordcloud2.js:606) but is gated behind `if (debug)` (:604), off by default, so no body mutation in normal use. The one persistent window listener is `window.addEventListener('message', ...)` (:37) — a one-time module-load setImmediate/setZeroTimeout polyfill (singleton, harmless, doesn't cross the shadow boundary), hence globalEvents=yes-but-benign. Render-time hover/click listeners are attached to the CANVAS element and gated by settings.hover/settings.click (default off), auto-removed on 'wordcloudstart'. Catalog passes the canvas as an ELEMENT so the `document.getElementById` string-id branch (:185) is never hit — all drawing stays in-canvas within the shadow container.
